overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a neon-lit nightclub. The player character walks through a VIP lounge, past neon wall art, into a crowded dance floor with performers, past a bar area, and finally into a back office room. The environment features heavy cyberpunk aesthetics with red, green, and blue neon lighting, holographic advertisements, and industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: VIP lounge with circular seating and holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit VIP lounge area with neon accents and a central laser display

entered.detail: circular seating area with drinks and bottles on top
vertical green laser light beam in the center of the room
floating digital displays showing advertisements above the seating
wall lined with red LED light strips

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark VIP lounge illuminated by red LED strips and a prominent green laser beam. A round table with drinks sits in the foreground while holographic screens float above. The space is empty of people, creating an intimate atmosphere before moving toward the neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor with neon wall art leading to main club

events.description: exiting lounge into narrow corridor with corrugated metal walls and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking past neon wall decorations including a large glowing condom sign and heart symbols

entered.detail: large blue neon sign depicting a condom wrapper
industrial metal siding with horizontal ridges
red neon heart shapes on the wall

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow corridor with industrial corrugated metal walls, the camera passes distinctive neon art including a large condom sign and heart symbols. The lighting shifts to emphasize blue and red neon as the space transitions toward the main club area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main nightclub floor with circular dance stages and holographic lighting

events.description: entering main dance floor with active performers on circular stages and increased crowd density

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded dance floor past circular stages with performers dancing on poles

notable_agents.action: dancer performing on a circular neon-lit stage
patron standing near stage watching the performance

entered.detail: raised circular platform with neon green edge lighting and a central pole
floating circular light fixtures and holographic displays above the dance floor
vertical neon-lit poles supporting the stage lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious dance floor with circular stages illuminated by green and red neon lights. Performers dance on elevated platforms while patrons gather around. Holographic displays float above, and the atmosphere is energetic with scattered crowds moving through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar area with neon signage and upper level seating

events.description: approaching bar counter with prominent Dicky neon sign and red heart decorations

agents.ego_description: walking past the bar area toward a back room entrance, passing by the main counter

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the bar counter

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading DICKY with a heart symbol
long bar with stools and green neon underlighting
cluster of red neon heart shapes on the wall behind the bar
staircase leading to an upper seating area

segments.scene_description: Moving past the main dance area, the camera approaches a bar with a prominent red neon sign reading DICKY. Red heart-shaped neon lights decorate the wall behind the counter, and a bartender stands ready. The space features an upper level accessible by stairs as the camera heads toward a back room.

scene_state.functional_zone: back office with computer setup and gang graffiti

events.description: entering back office through doorway, shifting from red neon to green ambient lighting
approaching desk where person is working, slowing movement

agents.ego_description: entering a dimly lit back office and approaching a desk with a seated individual working on a computer

notable_agents.action: person sitting at desk working on computer equipment

entered.detail: cluttered desk with computer monitors and electronic equipment
large wall mural with V logo and LA MUERTE text indicating gang territory
leather sofa against the wall under the graffiti
various posters and papers pinned to the wall near the desk

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a back office with dim green lighting, contrasting the vibrant neon of the club. A large Valentinos gang mural dominates one wall above a leather couch. The camera approaches a desk where a person works at a computer, surrounded by posters and equipment, creating an intimate, secretive atmosphere away from the main club floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an intimate, dimly lit VIP lounge through a vibrant nightclub and into a secretive back office. It begins in a dark lounge illuminated by red LED strips and a green laser beam, moving past holographic screens toward a narrow industrial corridor. As the camera passes neon heart symbols and corrugated metal walls, the space opens into an energetic dance floor filled with circular stages, performers, and floating holographic displays. The scene then shifts past a bar marked by a red neon sign and heart-shaped lights before turning away from the crowd toward a private rear entrance. Finally, the environment transitions into a dim green-lit office dominated by a gang mural and a leather couch, ending at a desk where a person works in quiet isolation.
